about.subheading: More Than A Dentist — A Neighbourhood Tradition
about.metaDescription: Get to know Bal Dental Centre — our team, our office, our patients, and our award-winning commitment to dentistry in Scarborough.

sections.heading: More Than A Dentist — A Neighbourhood Tradition
sections.body: Twenty-five years of award-winning dentistry, three generations of loyal patients, and one stubborn belief: that great dental care should feel calm, clear, and human.

new-patients.title: New Patient Welcome
new-patients.metaDescription: Welcome to Bal Dental Centre. New patient info, what to expect, insurance & financing, and how to book your first visit — all in one place.

sections.heading: New Patient Welcome
sections.body: Whether you're joining us for the first time or returning after years away — we're glad you're here. Find everything you need to make your first visit smooth, comfortable and stress-free.

sections.heading: Your First Visit
sections.subheading: What to Expect on Day One
sections.body: No clipboard pressure, no rushed exam, no surprise bills. Here's exactly how your first 60 minutes with us unfolds.

steps.title: Warm Welcome
steps.body: Coffee or tea? Take a seat in our welcome lounge — calm music, fresh refreshments, no pressure.

steps.title: Health Review
steps.body: We review your medical history, current concerns, and any goals — what brought you in matters most.

steps.title: Comprehensive Exam
steps.body: Digital X-rays, oral cancer screening, gum-pocket check, and detailed bite analysis. About 30 minutes.

steps.title: Your Written Plan
steps.body: Walk out with a custom plan in writing — pricing, options, insurance estimates and recommended sequence.

sections.heading: Save 15 Minutes
sections.subheading: Fill out your new patient paperwork from home
sections.body: Skip the clipboard. Complete our intake forms online before you arrive — your visit starts on time and your information stays secure on our HIPAA-compliant system.
bullets: Insurance details (we verify benefits for you)

sections.heading: Insurance & Financing
sections.body: We bill insurance directly so you never pay full price up-front. For uncovered care, we offer 0% financing and an affordable in-house membership plan.

financingOptions.label: 0% Interest Financing
financingOptions.body: 12–24 month payment plans on approved credit for treatments over $1,000.

financingOptions.label: Direct Insurance Billing
financingOptions.body: We submit, follow up, and only collect your portion at checkout.

financingOptions.label: In-House Membership Plan
financingOptions.body: No-insurance dental club: 2 cleanings/year + 20% off all treatment, $39/mo.

financingOptions.label: Senior & Student Discounts
financingOptions.body: 10% off all non-insured services for seniors 65+ and full-time students.

faqs.q: What should I bring to my first visit?
faqs.a: Photo ID, your insurance card (or details), and a list of any medications. If you have prior X-rays from another office, we'll happily review them for free.

faqs.q: How long is the first appointment?
faqs.a: Plan for 60–75 minutes: 15 min check-in & paperwork, 30 min comprehensive exam, 15 min treatment planning chat. We never rush.

faqs.q: Can I get a cleaning at my first visit?
faqs.a: Sometimes — it depends on your gum health. For some patients we recommend an exam first to plan a proper cleaning. We'll always discuss it with you up-front.
For emergencies — yes, always. For non-urgent visits, booking ensures we have proper time set aside for you. Try our online booking or call ahead.

faqs.q: What if I'm nervous about the dentist?
faqs.a: You're far from alone. We offer nitrous oxide (laughing gas), oral and IV sedation depending on your anxiety level. Just tell us — we'll go at your pace.

faqs.q: Will you push expensive treatment on me?
faqs.a: Never. We diagnose what we see, prioritize what's urgent, and present options (not ultimatums). Every plan is yours to take home and think about — no pressure.

sections.heading: Ready for a different kind of dental experience?
sections.body: Book your first visit. Walk out with a written plan, a clear sense of cost, and zero pressure. That's our promise.

cdcp-dentist.title: Canadian Dental Care Plan
cdcp-dentist.metaDescription: The Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) provides dental coverage for residents without dental benefits and a household income under $90,000 a year. Learn how it works at Bal Dental Centre in Scarborough.

sections.heading: The Canadian Dental Care Plan
sections.body: The Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) is a federal government program that is intended to provide coverage for Canadian residents who do not have dental benefits and have a household income of less than $90,000 a year.

sections.heading: Filling in the facts about the CDCP
bullets: Dental care under the CDCP is expected to start in May 2024.
The CDCP is a dental benefit administered by Health Canada.
It is not a free dental program. Patients may also have to pay costs the CDCP does not cover.
Not all dental services are covered under the CDCP.
Before proceeding with treatment, it is important to understand your dental care costs.
Please tell your dental provider if you plan to use CDCP benefits as their practice may or may not participate in the federal program.

copaymentTiers.description: No co-payment of the CDCP benefit for those with an adjusted annual family net income under $70,000.
A 40 per cent co-payment of the CDCP benefit for those with an adjusted annual family net income between $70,000 and $79,999.
A 60 per cent co-payment of the CDCP benefit for those with an adjusted annual family net income between $80,000 and $89,999.

sections.heading: Do You Qualify?
sections.subheading: Now Open To All Eligible Canadians
sections.body: The Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) is now open to all eligible Canadians, regardless of age.
bullets: Have no access to private dental insurance
Have a family net income under $90,000
sections.body2: Eligible individuals can apply online, by phone, or through a Service Canada Centre.

sections.heading: Services That May Be Covered
sections.body: Examples of services that could be covered under the CDCP when recommended by your dentist. Coverage levels vary by group, which affects your co-payment and any remaining balance.

coveredServices.examples: Fillings to repair damaged or decayed teeth.

faqs.q: How do I access the CDCP?
faqs.a: The federal government has opened application for the CDCP in phases starting in December 2023. Seniors who are eligible will receive letters inviting them to apply, with instructions on how to validate their eligibility and apply by telephone.

faqs.q: What services will be covered under the CDCP?
faqs.a: Examples include: preventive services (scaling, polishing, sealants, fluoride); diagnostic services (examinations, X-rays); restorative services (fillings); endodontic services (root canals); prosthodontic services (dentures); periodontal services (deep scaling); and oral surgery (extractions). Every group has a different level of coverage.

faqs.q: Am I eligible for the CDCP if I already receive coverage from provincial government programs?
faqs.a: If you are eligible for existing provincial government programs, you will still be able to apply for the CDCP. Benefits will be coordinated between the programs, which means that your coverage will not be duplicated.

faqs.q: What is included when they say dental insurance?
faqs.a: Not having access to dental insurance is defined as: no dental insurance through your employer or a family member's employer benefits; no dental insurance through your pension; no dental insurance purchased by yourself or through a group plan.

faqs.q: Should I cancel my private insurance?
faqs.a: No. The government has said that the CDCP is not intended to replace existing workplace or private dental benefits. If you have existing insurance, you SHOULD NOT cancel your insurance.

faqs.q: When can I get my CDCP benefits?
faqs.a: Once you've applied through Health Canada and they confirm you qualify, your information will be shared with Sun Life, who will enroll you in the CDCP. Sun Life will then send you your coverage start date and member card.

faqs.q: Should I wait until the CDCP is launched before visiting the dentist?
faqs.a: No. It's better to continue getting regular dental checkups now to catch problems before they become painful and expensive to treat, and apply for the plan when you are eligible to do so.

services.title: Complete Dental Care
services.metaDescription: Complete dental services in Scarborough — preventive, restorative, cosmetic, orthodontics, and emergency care. All under one roof, billed direct to insurance.

sections.heading: Complete Dental Care
sections.body: From your child's first cleaning to grandpa's implants — every dental need answered under one roof. Direct insurance billing, transparent pricing, and treatment plans you can take home in writing.

services.name: Preventive Dentistry
services.description: Cleanings, exams, and protective treatments that stop problems before they start.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent, natural-feeling teeth replacements starting at $3,000 all-inclusive.

services.name: Dental Crowns & Bridges
services.description: Restore damaged or missing teeth with tooth-coloured crowns and natural-looking bridges.

services.name: Dentures & Partials
services.description: Custom-crafted dentures that fit comfortably and look completely natural.

services.name: Tooth-Colored Fillings
services.description: Mercury-free, metal-free composite fillings that match your tooth perfectly.

services.name: Root Canal
services.description: Gentle, same-day root canals that relieve severe pain and save your natural tooth.

services.name: Tooth Extractions
services.description: Gentle, calm tooth removal when a tooth can't be saved — including wisdom teeth.

categories.label: Cosmetic
categories.description: Designed smiles built around your face.

services.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Smile makeovers, whitening, veneers, and bonding — designed around your face and goals.

services.name: Porcelain Veneers
services.description: Hand-crafted porcelain shells that transform your smile in just two visits.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional whitening that goes 5–8 shades brighter than over-the-counter strips.

services.name: Lumineers
services.description: Ultra-thin, no-prep veneers — a reversible alternative to traditional porcelain veneers.

services.name: Composite Bonding
services.description: Same-day repair for chips, gaps and small cosmetic concerns — no drilling required.

services.name: Snap-On Smile
services.description: Removable, non-invasive smile makeover — snap a beautiful new smile over your existing teeth.

services.name: Orthodontics
services.description: Comprehensive orthodontic care for children, teens and adults — braces and clear aligners.

services.name: Invisalign Clear Braces
services.description: Virtually invisible aligners that straighten teeth without metal wires or brackets.

services.name: TMJ Therapy
services.description: Relief from jaw pain, headaches and grinding through customized TMJ treatment.

services.name: Sedation Dentistry
services.description: Nitrous, oral and IV sedation options for nervous patients and complex procedures.

services.name: Dental Emergency
services.description: Same-day emergency care for tooth pain, broken teeth, knocked-out teeth and abscesses.
